code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut cur = ""
mut has_any = false
mut max_v = 0
mut min_v = 0

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(cur)
      let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if not has_any
        max_v = v
        min_v = v
        has_any = true
      else
        if v > max_v
          max_v = v
        end
        if v < min_v
          min_v = v
        end
      end
      cur = ""
    end
  else
    cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(cur)
  let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if not has_any
    max_v = v
    min_v = v
    has_any = true
  else
    if v > max_v
      max_v = v
    end
    if v < min_v
      min_v = v
    end
  end
end

println("max=#{max_v}")
println("min=#{min_v}")
